summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WealthDock finance tracker design overhaul. All major design features tested successfully with one critical bug fixed.

ui_bugs.issue: Active state was showing green background instead of blue
ui_bugs.status: FIXED - Added !important to CSS rules to override conflicting styles

passed_tests: Dashboard loads with clean KPI banner (no gradients)
Sidebar navigation now uses blue active state (fixed)
Transactions page has pagination (25 items per page)
Investments page has category filter tabs (6 tabs)
Investments page shows horizontal bar chart for portfolio breakdown
Life OS habit tracker grid spans full width with proper layout
All cards have consistent hover effects with blue border
No gradient backgrounds on any stat cards - clean design confirmed
All navigation between pages working smoothly
